mapper.select: SELECT * FROM retired_staff ORDER BY staff_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO retired_staff (staff_id, real_name, photo, gender, id_card, age, nation, education, native_place, work_start_date, retire_date, former_dept, job_title, phone) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{realName}, #{photo}, #{gender}, #{idCard}, #{age}, #{nation}, #{education}, #{nativePlace}, #{workStartDate}, #{retireDate}, #{formerDept}, #{jobTitle}, #{phone})
